tradeoff_note: Paragraph-based chunking respects the natural one-fact-per-line structure of this KB, which keeps each chunk focused and improves top-1 hit rate. Fixed-size chunking (300 chars, 50 overlap) is more general-purpose but can split related facts across chunks or merge unrelated ones, slightly hurting precision on this small corpus. For larger, less structured documents fixed-size is usually competitive.
